decisions.rationale: The observation resolves to base_record_id corridor_34th-st-busway, which is the correct existing registry record for this 34th Street corridor in Manhattan. The registry record already includes source_id 201110_brt_34th_open_house_slides and alias corridor_34th-st-manhattan-201110. No different existing record is a better match.

evidence_refs.source_quote: the proposed subway alignment from Twelfth Avenue to First Avenue
